githubAbout:
I'm a **Software Engineer** focused on production backends and applied AI systems, bringing RAG pipelines and multi-agent workflows from prototype to stable production.

I bridge high-throughput backend architecture and intelligent LLM orchestration: production APIs, data pipelines, vector database integration, caching, auth, and agent lifecycle management.

Currently at **Keyrium**, I lead development of backend systems for high-concurrency enterprise APIs (Loyalty Rewards & Stock Trading) using **Node.js**, **TypeScript**, and **PostgreSQL**, including system design, CI/CD automation, cloud deployment, and testing (85% code coverage).

**Focus areas:** Scalable distributed architectures · LLM orchestration · RAG pipelines · Multi-agent workflows · Cloud & API optimization

**Stack:** Node.js · TypeScript · Python · PostgreSQL · AWS · RAG · Agentic AI

**Let's connect:** [okeowoemmanuelm@gmail.com](mailto:okeowoemmanuelm@gmail.com) · [Portfolio](https://epicnode.hostless.site) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/okeowoemmanuelm/)
linkedinAbout:
I'm a Software Engineer based in Lagos, specializing in production backends and applied AI systems. I build scalable APIs, distributed services, RAG pipelines, semantic search, and multi-agent workflows from prototype to reliable production.

My work spans high-throughput backend engineering and applied LLM orchestration: REST/microservice APIs, data pipelines, vector database integration, caching, authentication, and agent lifecycle management.

Currently at Keyrium, I lead development of backend systems for high-concurrency enterprise APIs (Loyalty Rewards & Stock Trading) using Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL, including architecture, CI/CD automation, cloud deployment, and a testing framework with 85% code coverage.

Previously, I've improved API and database performance by 30–80% across fintech and platform backends, and built secure auth systems with JWT, OAuth 2.0, MFA, and RBAC.

Focus areas: Scalable distributed architectures · LLM orchestration · RAG pipelines · Multi-agent workflows · Cloud & API optimization

Stack: Node.js · TypeScript · Python · PostgreSQL · AWS · RAG · Agentic AI

Open to Software Engineer, Backend Engineer, and AI/LLM system roles (remote/hybrid).

Portfolio: epicnode.hostless.site
Email: okeowoemmanuelm@gmail.com

highlights: AI & LLM Orchestration: production-ready RAG pipelines, semantic search, and multi-agent workflows
Production-Grade Backends: scalable REST/gRPC APIs, microservices, and distributed systems

Data & Infrastructure: vector databases, relational database optimization, caching, and secure authentication
Continuous Growth: open-source contributor integrating emerging DeepTech and AI frameworks

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Leading development of production-grade RESTful APIs for Loyalty Rewards and Stock Trading platforms using Node.js and TypeScript. Architecting secure systems and integrating third-party services to enable seamless multi-channel communication. Established a comprehensive testing framework with 85% code coverage, significantly reducing post-deployment bug reports.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Refactored and optimized database queries by adding targeted indexes and streamlining joins, achieving 40–60% faster query times with reduced latency. Streamlined the middleware stack by eliminating redundancies and improving throughput, delivering 30–50% faster API response speeds. Implemented a Node.js caching layer to reduce repetitive database calls and optimize cache headers, attaining up to 80% faster static asset loads.

experience.title: Backend Software Engineer
experience.description: Engineered the backend for Evently, a dynamic event management platform enabling users to discover, RSVP to, and manage events seamlessly. Built RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express, implemented JWT-based role authentication, integrated PayStack and PCI-DSS compliance, and optimized PostgreSQL schemas for secure, scalable performance under concurrent load.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Implemented a server-side caching strategy with optimized cache-control headers, accelerating static asset delivery by up to 80%. Engineered a multi-provider authentication system (JWT, OAuth 2.0, MFA) with role-based access control and third-party integrations for email, SMS, and push notifications. Integrated APIs with the client-side application, ensuring seamless data flow and UI responsiveness.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
experience.location: Long Island, Virginia, United States · Remote
experience.description: Built full-stack applications using React, Python, Django REST Framework, and PostgreSQL to demonstrate production-ready code architecture. Sharpened algorithmic problem-solving through intensive DSA workshops covering time complexity, optimization, and system design fundamentals.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.description: Maintained and extended web applications built on the Laravel framework, optimizing backend architecture for reliable data management. Designed relational database schemas in MySQL to securely handle records, course progress tracking, and content management. Built responsive, mobile-friendly dashboards and course catalogs using Bootstrap, improving user engagement and content accessibility across devices.
